question: Litesizer 500 做温度序列测量时，平衡时间有什么要求？
gold_sources: manuals/Litesizer 500 Instruction Manual .pdf
gold_sections: Using the Litesizer 500 at High and Low Temperature
reference_answer: Litesizer 500 手册要求在非室温测量时加入额外平衡时间。接近室温的粒径测量，equilibration time 建议设为 2 min；温度离环境温度越远，需要越长平衡时间，常用经验是 1 mL 样品每偏离环境温度 1 °C 增加 1 min。
notes: [sop-only] 应引用 Litesizer 手册，不应编造实验参数。
required_sources: manuals/Litesizer 500 Instruction Manual .pdf

question: MRBL 实验室 General Lab Rules 对危险化学品引入和废弃物处置有哪些基本要求？
gold_sources: manuals/General Lab Rules MRBL-2.pdf
reference_answer: General Lab Rules 要求新化学品引入需登记/审批，危险化学品章节说明 MSDS、通风橱使用和处置流程；废弃物处置章节规定分类、标签和本地处置路径。
notes: [sop-only] Hard negative: 其他 MSDS 手册也可能被召回，但 gold 应来自 General Lab Rules。
required_sources: manuals/General Lab Rules MRBL-2.pdf

question: Bioelectronics Lab S1 安全培训中，关于 genetic engineering / biosafety 需要了解哪些组织与法规背景？
gold_sources: manuals/BioelectronicsLab-S1-SafetyBriefing.pdf
reference_answer: BioelectronicsLab-S1-SafetyBriefing 说明 S1 实验室需遵守 Genetic Engineering Act 及相关条例，涵盖 biological/gene-technological safety、organism risk 与 donor/acceptor gene 风险。
notes: [sop-only] 英文 SOP；问题用中文提问测试 cross-language retrieval。
required_sources: manuals/BioelectronicsLab-S1-SafetyBriefing.pdf

question: 使用 BA Magnetic stirrer 时，关于 stirring speed、容器选择和火灾/短路风险有哪些操作要求？
gold_sources: manuals/BA Magnetic stirrer_eng.pdf
reference_answer: BA Magnetic stirrer 操作说明要求选择低 stirring speed、仅使用完好合适容器，并警告 fire/short circuit 与 hot surface 风险；故障时应停止并联系负责人。
notes: [sop-only] Hard negative: 其他 heating plate 手册。
required_sources: manuals/BA Magnetic stirrer_eng.pdf

question: Laser Safety and Alignment 文档中，激光对准（alignment）时应使用什么功率策略和观察工具？
gold_sources: manuals/Laser Safety and Alignment.pdf
reference_answer: Laser Safety and Alignment 要求 alignment 时使用 low-power laser、minimum power levels，并用 viewing card 观察光路；不得损坏 protective housing 或用 viewing instruments 直视光束。
notes: [sop-only] 与 Wang 2025 NIR laser 论文形成 hard negative（hybrid 题单独测）。
required_sources: manuals/Laser Safety and Alignment.pdf

question: BA Fume hood 操作规范中，关于 sash、flammable gases 和 explosion risk 有哪些要求？
gold_sources: manuals/BA Fume hood_eng.pdf
reference_answer: BA Fume hood 说明 flammable gases/vapors 存在 explosion risk；除必要操作外应保持 sash closed，并在 sash 打开时避免 hazardous substances 暴露。
notes: [sop-only] Hard negative: General Lab Rules 也提到 fume hood。
required_sources: manuals/BA Fume hood_eng.pdf

question: Photothermally powered 3D microgels 这篇论文的完整制备/刺激流程中，当前上下文能支持哪些关键步骤和参数？
gold_sources: papers/Advanced Materials - 2025 - Wang - Photothermally Powered 3D Microgels Mechanically Regulate Mesenchymal Stem Cells Under (2).pdf
reference_answer: Wang 2025 描述 microfluidic fabrication、gold nanorods/nanoactuators、alginate 交联与 785 nm NIR laser photothermal actuation 等关键参数。
notes: [paper-only] Strong title anchor expected; hard negatives: other microgel papers.
required_sources: papers/Advanced Materials - 2025 - Wang - Photothermally Powered 3D Microgels Mechanically Regulate Mesenchymal Stem Cells Under (2).pdf

question: İyisan 2024 Mechanoactivation 论文中，3D-printed stimulation device 如何对 single stem cells in microgels 施加机械刺激？
gold_sources: papers/Small Methods - 2024 - İyisan - Mechanoactivation of Single Stem Cells in Microgels Using a 3D‐Printed Stimulation Device.pdf
reference_answer: Small Methods 2024 使用 3D-printed stimulation device 在 microgels 中对 single stem cells 进行 mechanoactivation；应引用 device 设计与 stimulation 条件，而非 Wang 2025 photothermal 流程。
notes: [paper-only] Hard negative: Wang 2025 / İyisan 2025 hydrostatic pressure.
required_sources: papers/Small Methods - 2024 - İyisan - Mechanoactivation of Single Stem Cells in Microgels Using a 3D‐Printed Stimulation Device.pdf

question: Small Science 2025 论文中，hydrostatic pressure 如何在 viscoelastic microgels 中诱导 single stem cells 的 osteogenic differentiation？
gold_sources: papers/Small Science - 2025 - İyisan - Hydrostatic Pressure Induces Osteogenic Differentiation of Single Stem Cells in 3D (1).pdf
reference_answer: İyisan 2025 报告 hydrostatic pressure 在 3D viscoelastic microgels 中对 single stem cells 的 osteogenic differentiation；与 photothermal/mechanoactivation 平台不同。
notes: [paper-only] Hard negative: İyisan 2024 mechanoactivation device.
required_sources: papers/Small Science - 2025 - İyisan - Hydrostatic Pressure Induces Osteogenic Differentiation of Single Stem Cells in 3D (1).pdf

question: Özkale 2024 perspective 论文如何描述 biopolymer microgels 作为 stem cell cultivation tool-box 的价值？
gold_sources: papers/Adv Materials Inter - 2024 - Özkale - Why Biopolymer Microgels with Dynamically Switchable Properties Would be a Great.pdf
reference_answer: Özkale 2024 从 dynamically switchable biopolymer microgels 角度讨论 stem cell cultivation toolbox，是观点/综述型证据而非完整 wet-lab protocol。
notes: [paper-only] Hard negative: Wang experimental paper.
required_sources: papers/Adv Materials Inter - 2024 - Özkale - Why Biopolymer Microgels with Dynamically Switchable Properties Would be a Great.pdf

question: Actuated 3D microgels for single cell mechanobiology 这篇论文的核心研究对象和应用场景是什么？
gold_sources: papers/d2lc00203e1.pdf
reference_answer: d2lc00203e1 聚焦 actuated 3D microgels 用于 single cell mechanobiology，与 Wang photothermal MSC 或 İyisan hydrostatic osteogenesis 读out 不同。
notes: [paper-only] Hard negative: multiple actuated/microgel papers in corpus.
required_sources: papers/d2lc00203e1.pdf

question: 对比两篇关于 3D microgels mechanical stimulation 的论文，刺激方式、时间和细胞响应有什么差异？

papers/Small Methods - 2024 - İyisan - Mechanoactivation of Single Stem Cells in Microgels Using a 3D‐Printed Stimulation Device.pdf
reference_answer: Wang 2025 为 photothermal 3D microgel + NIR laser；İyisan 2024 为 3D-printed stimulation device mechanoactivation。比较维度：stimulus modality、duration、cell readout。
notes: [paper-comparison] Corpus-level; do not force single-paper anchor.

papers/Small Methods - 2024 - İyisan - Mechanoactivation of Single Stem Cells in Microgels Using a 3D‐Printed Stimulation Device.pdf
